tweet.text:

Get your own yard sign with stand to show your support for the only vote that matte…

gotta have poise downfield

RT @sskroughriders: Bryan Cox Jr., everyone! 👏
Congrats to the Rider DL, who scored a 90.3 last week, placing him at the top of the Class…

thankful 💫 https://t.co/5meAZO07OG
